chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-09 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 09.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh *** No one is in attendance on behalf of the petitioners and no intimation has been received. Even otherwise, the petitioners are seeking appointment on the basis of son quota. Learned AAG pointed out that no such quota exists. Under the circumstance, the petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
